hero.headline: We are interested in
hero.body: Most firms are built to sound coherent, flat, simple. We are built to hold complexity without collapsing it into something smaller.

manifesto.headline: Built to hold complexity
manifesto.pullQuote: The mythological chimera was difficult to kill because it was never built from a single logic. Neither are the strategic implementations that endure.
manifesto.col1Lead: There are agencies that optimize attention. We are interested in gravity.
manifesto.col1Body: Most can generate visibility around a company. Far fewer can shape the conditions under which that company becomes relevant and self-aware.
manifesto.col2Lead: A founder's language. The pacing of an announcement. The media you refuse.
manifesto.col2Body: The people willing to defend your company when you are absent. These are not surface decisions. They are signals — and signals accumulate into perception long before they become conscious analysis.
manifesto.col3Lead: Every company already communicates a worldview.
manifesto.col3Body: Through hiring, through design, through capital allocation, through what gets protected when pressure arrives. The question is not whether meaning exists. The question is whether it is intentional.

services.headline: Three layers.
services.footer: Engagements are structured as quarterly retainers, with specialist projects activated separately when required. We work with a limited number of clients at a time.

contact.headline: A brief, a question,
contact.contextPlaceholder: A short note on what brings you here. We treat first contacts as confidential by default.
contact.successAccent: We respond personally within two working days.

footer.tagline: "Built to hold complexity without collapsing it into something smaller."
